result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv [options]
  godotenv [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  addons            Manage addons for a Godot project. Subcommands: addons init, addons install.
  config            Manage godotenv configuration. Subcommands: config list, config set.
  godot             Manage Godot installations. Subcommands: godot cache, godot env, godot install, godot list, godot pin, godot uninstall, godot use.

You can run `godotenv [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,

USAGE
  godotenv [options]
  godotenv [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  addons            Manage addons for a Godot project. Subcommands: addons init, addons install.
  config            Manage godotenv configuration. Subcommands: config list, config set.
  godot             Manage Godot installations. Subcommands: godot cache, godot env, godot install, godot list, godot pin, godot uninstall, godot use.

You can run `godotenv [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv addons [options]
  godotenv addons [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Manage addons for a Godot project.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  init              Create a new addons configuration file (if not present), create/adjust .gitignore to prevent addons from entering source control, and add a .editorconfig file in the addons directory to prevent addons from causing unnecessary IDE analyzer warnings. Runs non-destructively. 
  install           Install addons in a Godot project. 

You can run `godotenv addons [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv godot [options]
  godotenv godot [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Manage Godot installations.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  cache             Manage the Godot installation cache. Subcommands: cache clear.
  env               Manage the GODOT environment variable and get the symlink path to the active version of Godot. Subcommands: env get, env path, env setup, env target.
  install           Install a version of Godot. 
  list              List installed Godot versions. 
  pin               Pins the current Godot project to the active Godot version by writing a version-specifier file to the project directory. 
  uninstall         Uninstalls the specified version of Godot. 
  use               Changes the active version of Godot by updating the symlink to point to the specified version. 

You can run `godotenv godot [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,

DESCRIPTION
  Manage Godot installations.

OPTIONS

COMMANDS
  cache             Manage the Godot installation cache. Subcommands: cache clear.
  env               Manage the GODOT environment variable and get the symlink path to the active version of Godot. Subcommands: env get, env path, env setup, env target.
  install           Install a version of Godot. 
  list              List installed Godot versions. 
  pin               Pins the current Godot project to the active Godot version by writing a version-specifier file to the project directory. 
  uninstall         Uninstalls the specified version of Godot. 
  use               Changes the active version of Godot by updating the symlink to point to the specified version. 

You can run `godotenv godot [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv godot env [options]
  godotenv godot env [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Manage the GODOT environment variable and get the symlink path to the active version of Godot.

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 

COMMANDS
  get               Show the contents of the GODOT user environment variable. 
  path              Get the symlink path to the active version of Godot. 
  setup             Set the user-wide GODOT environment variable to the symlink which always points to the active version of Godot. 
  target            Get the path to the active version of Godot. 

You can run `godotenv godot env [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv godot install <Version> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Install a version of Godot.

PARAMETERS
  Version           Godot version to install: e.g., 4.1.0-rc.2, 4.2.0, etc. Should match a version of Godot (https://github.com/godotengine/godot-builds/tags) or GodotSharp (https://www.nuget.org/packages/GodotSharp/) 

OPTIONS
  -n|--no-dotnet    Specify to use the version of Godot that does not support C#/.NET. Default: "False".
  --unsafe-skip-checksum-verification  UNSAFE! Specify to skip checksum verification. Default: "False".
  -x|--proxy        Specify a proxy server URL to use for downloads (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:1080). 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,

  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE

DESCRIPTION
  Install a version of Godot.

PARAMETERS
  Version           Godot version to install: e.g., 4.1.0-rc.2, 4.2.0, etc. Should match a version of Godot (https://github.com/godotengine/godot-builds/tags) or GodotSharp (https://www.nuget.org/packages/GodotSharp/) 

OPTIONS
  -n|--no-dotnet    Specify to use the version of Godot that does not support C#/.NET. Default: "False".
  --unsafe-skip-checksum-verification  UNSAFE! Specify to skip checksum verification. Default: "False".
  -x|--proxy        Specify a proxy server URL to use for downloads (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:1080). 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  Uninstalls the specified version of Godot.

PARAMETERS
* Version           Godot version to install: e.g., 4.1.0-rc.2, 4.2.0, etc. Should match a version of Godot (https://github.com/godotengine/godot-builds/tags) or GodotSharp (https://www.nuget.org/packages/GodotSharp/) 

OPTIONS
  -n|--no-dotnet    Specify the version of Godot that does not support C#/.NET. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

commands.payload:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv godot uninstall <Version> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Uninstalls the specified version of Godot.

PARAMETERS
* Version           Godot version to install: e.g., 4.1.0-rc.2, 4.2.0, etc. Should match a version of Godot (https://github.com/godotengine/godot-builds/tags) or GodotSharp (https://www.nuget.org/packages/GodotSharp/) 

OPTIONS
  -n|--no-dotnet    Specify the version of Godot that does not support C#/.NET. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
GodotEnv 2.16.2+2a0d6fc7eefe709f7f368ae32f4c6a55c946759c
  Manage your Godot environment from the command line on Windows, macOS,
  and Linux. Setup different versions of Godot and automatically update
  environment variables, as well as addons from local, remote, and even
  symlink'd paths using an addons.json file.

USAGE
  godotenv godot use <Version> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Changes the active version of Godot by updating the symlink to point to the specified version.

PARAMETERS
  Version           Godot version to install: e.g., 4.1.0-rc.2, 4.2.0, etc. Should match a version of Godot (https://github.com/godotengine/godot-builds/tags) or GodotSharp (https://www.nuget.org/packages/GodotSharp/) 

OPTIONS
  -n|--no-dotnet    Specify to use the version of Godot that does not support C#/.NET. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
